title: malva thuringiaca
intro: Malva thuringiaca, also known as marshmallow, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant's roots and leaves contain mucilages, which are complex carbohydrates responsible for its medicinal properties, providing soothing and protective effects on mucous membranes. The health benefits of Malva thuringiaca include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome and ulcers, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Malva thuringiaca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and modern herbalism.
